ExplnOfNonFilingWithAGStmt.ExplanationTxt: THE OHIO ATTORNEY GENERAL DOES NOT ACCEPT COPIES OF THE FORM 990-PF. INSTEAD, THE ORGANIZATION HAS COMPLIED WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE OHIO ATTORNEY GENERAL TO COMPLETE A SEPARATE ONLINE FILING WITH THAT OFFICE.
